name: Butler Brain
description: Optional cloud-brain escalation: the local model offers to ask Claude (Claude Code CLI) genuinely hard questions via an [[ASK]] action marker; the user taps to consent, the answer is pushed and fills into the chat.

timeoutMs.description: How long a claude -p run may take before it's killed. Default 300000 (5 min).

maxAnswerChars.description: Answers are capped at this many characters. Default 6000.

model.description: Optional --model override for the Claude CLI. Default: whatever the CLI is configured to use.

nudge.description: Set false to stop teaching the local model the [[ASK]] marker (the HTTP route keeps working). Default true.
